summary: Full backend + frontend testing for Chris Ruzario portfolio. All flows work: hero, nav smooth scroll, 10 skills, 3 project cards, 3 experience items, contact form validation + submission + persistence, mobile hamburger menu.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is defined AFTER _send_contact_email uses it in the except block (line 88). It works only because create_contact runs after module init finishes, but logger should be initialized before route/handler definitions for clarity.
server.py: uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown') - consider lifespan handlers.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST_ contact message via API and 1 via UI (both persisted in db.contact_messages).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints: POST/GET /api/contact working. RESEND_API_KEY empty by design, email_sent=false is expected. All data-testids present and functional. Mobile menu toggle works.
